item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pendapat bahwa prioritas masyarakat tidak bisa sepenuhnya mengalahkan hak individu.

notes: Agent A remains moderately pro-society by the final turn, grounding the view in Indonesian collective values, harmony, stability, and limits on unlimited personal freedom, but visibly softens at turn 3 by accepting that society's priority cannot fully override individual rights. Agent B stays firmly rights-first throughout, repeatedly invoking U.S. constitutional protections and individual liberty, with only bounded recognition that social harmony and collective policy aims matter. Turn 6 contains a language/script artifact: "集体利益" appears inside an English sentence.
